info.title: ConfigCrypter.Console
info.description: DevAttic ConfigCrypter Console is a dotnet tool used to encrypt and decrypt keys in configuration files.

commands.name: decrypt
commands.description: Decrypts a key in the config file.

options.name: --name
options.description:
(Group: CertLocation) The subject name of the certificate
(CN). This can only be used in Windows environments.

options.name: --key
options.description: Required. The key to encrypt in the config file.

options.name: --file
options.description: Required. The path to the config file.

options.name: --replace
options.description:
(Default: false) Replaces the original file if passed as
parameter.

options.name: --format
options.description: (Default: Json) The format of the config file.

commands.name: encrypt
commands.description: Encrypts a key in the config file.

options.name: --name
options.description:
(Group: CertLocation) The subject name of the certificate
(CN). This can only be used in Windows environments.

options.name: --key
options.description: Required. The key to encrypt in the config file.

options.name: --file
options.description: Required. The path to the config file.

options.name: --replace
options.description:
(Default: false) Replaces the original file if passed as
parameter.

options.name: --format
options.description: (Default: Json) The format of the config file.
